details: The agent correctly identified the failing pod (api-5bb6467d5-6dbzv) in the fault-crashloop namespace, retrieved its logs using both --previous and current log commands, and quoted the exact error message: 'FATAL: cannot connect to database db.internal:5432 - connection refused'. The agent also correctly identified the root cause (the container command is hardcoded to print the error and exit with code 1, triggering CrashLoopBackOff).
